transcription.text: With over 400,000 cars in 132 countries throughout the world, Hertz makes it easy to rent a car. Whether your trip starts in Kitchener or Korea, there's a Hertz Rent-A-Car office to serve you. With fantastic rates on weekend and weekly rentals, our free customer pickup and delivery service, handy one-way rentals, and a host of other outstanding service benefits. When you want to rent a car, remember the name. Hertz. Can you really afford to rent from anyone else?
